title: Repair Path.bd header doc and Tier1 test formatting

source.subject: fix(corelib): repair Path.bd header doc and collapse blank lines in Tier1 tests

body:
Repairs `Path.bd` header documentation and collapses stray blank lines in Tier1 tests so trudoc and corelib CI stay green.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `corelib`
- **Commit:** [`c1011b1`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_standard/commit/c1011b1)
- **Subject:** fix(corelib): repair Path.bd header doc and collapse blank lines in Tier1 tests
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `stabilization`
- **Domain:** `core-library`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-corelib-tier-ship`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **Corelib tier collections ship** (`v03-corelib-tier-ship`).
